description_long: This is a sleek, modern light jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a predominantly white and red color scheme accented by dynamic silver and gray striping. The wings are low-mounted and straight, extending outward with a slight dihedral angle and featuring small winglets at the tips. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed with a dark-tinted canopy and has multiple side windows, suggesting a multi-seat configuration. The tail section is distinctive, utilizing a V-tail design with two upward-angled stabilizers. The engine is mounted at the rear of the fuselage, integrated into the tail section, and appears to be a single jet engine. The airplane's surface is smooth and glossy, with visible panel lines and markings for identification.
description: A modern, compact light jet airplane with a white and red livery, low straight wings with winglets, a V-tail, and a rear-mounted jet engine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical low-mounted wings with winglets and V-tail visible behind.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit windows, low straight wing, and the V-tail with the rear engine intake visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the V-tail configuration, rear engine placement, and the full span of the wings with winglets.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cockpit, wing, and V-tail, with visible surface markings and engine integration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings, slight dihedral angle, and small upward winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: V-tail configuration with two upward-angled stabilizers and no conventional vertical fin.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with main and nose gear units implied by typical design.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-seat configuration and large side windows.
